productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Blue Sling Bag
description: Deviating from the label's standard leatherette trend, Linos Perros comes up with this line of distressed retro chic denim pieces for the contemporary vintage vibe. Work the 70's aesthetic with this stylish piece and style it with a worn-out denim vest or pants! Comes with a detachable handle and shoulder strap. Height: 26 cm Width: 16 cm Denim upper with leatherette trims Two zippered compartments with a zippered pocket in one Fold over style with leatherette and crystal embellishments on the front (spells the brand name) Care Wipe with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust
